title: 5S rRNA in Heteroptera – the current state of knowledge and future prospects
author: Lis, Jerzy A.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This paper provides a comprehensive overview of current research on 5S rRNA in true bugs (Heteroptera). It also highlights existing findings and potential possibilities for future investigation in this field.
steps_raw: This paper provides a comprehensive overview of current research on 5S rRNA in true bugs (Heteroptera). It also highlights existing findings and potential possibilities for future investigation in this field.
